documentation.value: Writes one or more values to standard output followed by a newline character.
One or more expressions to write. Supports strings, integers, reals, booleans, and chars.
Reads a line of text from standard input into a variable.
The variable to store the input. Reads until end of line.
Returns the number of characters in a string or elements in a dynamic array.
The string or dynamic array whose length is returned.

signatures.label: Copy(s: string, index: Integer, count: Integer): string

documentation.value: Returns a substring of a string, starting at the given index for the given number of characters.
The source string.
The 1-based starting position.
The number of characters to copy.
Returns the position of the first occurrence of a substring in a string. Returns 0 if not found.
The substring to search for.
The string to search in.

signatures.label: Delete(var s: string, index: Integer, count: Integer): void

documentation.value: Removes count characters from string s starting at position index.
The string to modify (passed by reference).
The 1-based starting position to delete from.
The number of characters to delete.

signatures.label: Insert(source: string, var s: string, index: Integer): void

documentation.value: Inserts a substring into a string at the specified position.
The substring to insert.
The target string to insert into (passed by reference).
The 1-based position where the source string will be inserted.
Converts an integer value to its string representation.
The integer value to convert.
Converts a string to an integer value. Raises an exception if the string is not a valid integer.
The string containing an integer representation.
Concatenates two or more strings and returns the result.
The first string.
The second string.
Additional strings to concatenate.
Returns the ordinal (ASCII) value of a character.
The character whose ordinal value is returned.
Returns the character corresponding to the specified ASCII value.
An integer value representing the ASCII code (0-255).
Returns the absolute value of a numeric expression.
An integer or real number.
Returns a random integer between 0 and range-1. Call Randomize first to seed the generator.
The upper bound (exclusive). If omitted, returns a real number between 0.0 and 1.0.
